extra_model_fields.verifier_issues_summary: Grader evidence is grounded in the provided husbandry_action.md preview and trace; rubric weighting and final score are internally consistent. Two verification issues reduce reproducibility/complete validation: the spreadsheet artifact could not be programmatically parsed (openpyxl unavailable), and the memo preview is truncated so the full recommendation cost table cannot be verified.

metadata_json.public_response_summary: Model verifier checked grounding and score consistency.

issues.detail: The grader correctly notes openpyxl was unavailable and the XLSX preview could not be parsed (preview_error_message: 'No module named \u0027openpyxl\u0027'). This prevents automated verification of spreadsheet formulas, cell-level references, checks, and sensitivity-sheet implementation.
issues.suggested_action: Provide either a machine-parseable workbook (and ensure openpyxl or equivalent is available in the grading environment) or include explicit formula text/cell references in the memo to enable reproducibility checks.
issues.title: Workbook not programmatically parseable

issues.detail: The husbandry_action.md preview is truncated for the recommendation table (preview_truncated = true), so per-action cost totals and a summed total vs decision_budget_usd cannot be validated from the preview.
issues.suggested_action: Include the full recommendation table in the memo preview (or a separate costs summary) showing per-action costs and a summed total compared to decision_budget_usd.
issues.title: Recommendation table preview truncated

issues.impact: High for direct verification of cell formulas, sheet-level sensitivity computations, and automated flagging implementation; the grader relied on the markdown memo instead.
issues.recommended_action: Enable spreadsheet parsing (install/openpyxl) or include an explicit export of formula cells and the sensitivity_sheet as text/CSV for verifier inspection.
issues.summary: Spreadsheet (.xlsx) could not be parsed in this runtime (openpyxl unavailable).

issues.impact: Medium for verifying full recommendation list, cost totals, and explicit linkage of every recommendation row to evidence rows.
issues.recommended_action: Provide the full recommendation table (untruncated) and a cost summary that sums items and confirms total <= decision_budget_usd.
issues.summary: Recommendation table in husbandry_action.md preview is truncated.

key_verifications_performed.flagging_logic_consistency: Confirmed via memo logic and per-record flags (R1,R3,R4 needs_review; R2 ok). The governance rules as stated produce the reported 3-of-4 review set.

extra_model_fields.notes: Given the inability to parse the spreadsheet and the truncated recommendation preview, semantic verification is substantively supported by the memo but not fully reproducible from the provided artifacts alone.
recommended_next_steps: Provide a parsed view of feed_conversion_warning.xlsx (enable openpyxl or export calc sheets to CSV/text) so formulas, per-record boolean flag cells, and the sensitivity_sheet can be directly inspected.
Supply the complete husbandry_action.md recommendation table (no truncation) and an explicit cost-sum check against decision_budget_usd.
